one_html_rule: Only index.html remains as a .html file in the output package.
live_integration: Patched app.bundle.js supportAnswer() to delegate to the upgraded Momma psychiatrist bridge.
Patched app.bundle.js runPassiveScanner() to use the Momma bridge scanner first.
Copied upgraded bot data into /data and mirrored active files into /json.
Replaced legacy Onyx personality/support JSON snapshots with Momma-specific upgraded versions.
Added scanner + teaching console module to the Onyx support page.
not_included: Game HTML files were not added or changed. Existing GitHub games folder should remain in place.
safety_position: Onyx provides DBT/ADHD/supportive psychoeducation, safety triage, and crisis escalation guidance; it is not licensed care or emergency service.
